name: Tomato Quick Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups fresh tomato, peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients in a bowl.
2. Drain the tomatoes and measure the liquid into a measuring cup.
3. Add enough milk to make 2/3 cup of liquid.
4. Blend the liquid with eggs, oil, and honey until combined.
5. Stir the blended mixture into the dry ingredients until moistened.
6. Add the chopped tomatoes and pour the batter into a well-greased 4x8 inch loaf pan.
7. Place the pan in a preheated oven set to 350°F (175°C).
8. Bake for 60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Cover with a foil tent if it starts to brown earlier but continue baking until the bottom taps hollow when pressed.
10. Let cool for 10 minutes in the pan, then transfer to a wire rack to cool thoroughly before slicing.
11. Store in the refrigerator or freezer.
